verification_result.test_command: ninja -C build selfhost_rbcursive_smoke && ctest --test-dir build -R selfhost_rbcursive_smoke --output-on-failure

gap_analysis_summary: Pure cpp2 implementation COMPLETE - Kotlin transpilation ELIMINATED. All TrikeShed surfaces from docs/cpp2 implemented in src/selfhost/*.cpp2. Tests pass. Extended with function declarations, type declarations, pre/postcondition contracts, and slice_expr.
implemented_components: src/selfhost/bootstrap_tags.cpp2 - Integer tag constants that build
src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - Pure cpp2 scanner/combinator nucleus with full surface coverage (7100+ lines)
src/selfhost/trikeshed_series.cpp2 - Series expressions and α transform
src/selfhost/trikeshed_either.cpp2 - Either type for error handling

cpp2_spec_implementation.declarations: src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - unified declarations, template parameters, namespace blocks, function declarations, type declarations
cpp2_spec_implementation.expressions: src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - coords[...], chart, manifold, atlas, join operator, series α transform, pre/postconditions, slice_expr
cpp2_spec_implementation.contracts: src/selfhost/rbcursive.cpp2 - [[pure]], [[contiguous]] purity annotations, pre(...) and post(...) contracts

manifold/atlas - manifold and atlas literal declarations
a j b - join operator expressions
series α (x) => expr - alpha transform expressions
expression j (identifier : type) => expression - indexed_expr syntax
